questions.question: Describe the key differences between Hyperledger Fabric and Corda. How do these differences impact their use cases?
questions.hint: Focus on architecture, consensus mechanisms, and use cases

questions.question: What is the main advantage of using Sawtooth Lake over other blockchain platforms?
questions.hint: Focus on scalability, performance, or business model

questions.question: Explain how Hyperledger Fabric's consensus algorithm works, including the role of the orderer node and the client nodes.
questions.hint: Focus on the gossip protocol, orderer node, and client node interactions
